shellCommands.command: cd /home/user/workspace && find . -maxdepth 3 -type f | sed 's#^./##' | sort | head -200

cd /home/user/workspace && sed -n '1,220p' AGENTS.md && printf '
---
' && sed -n '1,220p' app/page.tsx && printf '
---
' && sed -n '1,220p' app/layout.tsx
cd /home/user/workspace && cat package.json && printf '\n---next config---\n' && sed -n '1,220p' next.config.ts
